{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "Rubeus.exe is a known credential access tool. The command line arguments 'asktgt' with an RC4 hash and '/createnetonly' indicate an attempt to perform Kerberos credential theft and reuse, which is highly malicious behavior.",
  "indicators": [
    "Rubeus.exe",
    "asktgt",
    "/rc4",
    "/createnetonly",
    "powershell.exe (parent process)",
    "cmd.exe (child process for credential reuse)"
  ]
}
